action: Created HookRegistry + HookEvent with TDD. Code Quality Review requested logging.warning for exceptions — added. User accepted best-effort fire() semantics.
notes: CQR wanted error propagation/configurable policies — user chose to keep best-effort semantics with logging.warning

task_title: Integration — Refactor modules to use hooks.fire()
action: Refactored 5 modules to use HookRegistry.fire() instead of direct FlowLog.step(). CQR initially flagged fire() semantics (same as Task 1), user confirmed it was already accepted. CQR approved on re-review.
notes: CQR kept flagging fire() best-effort semantics — already accepted in Task 1

action: Updated test_orchestrator.py and test_langgraph.py to use HookRegistry. test_flow_log.py, test_router.py, test_cli.py needed no changes. 58/58 non-langgraph tests pass.
notes: Concern: test_langgraph.py fails due to missing langgraph module — pre-existing, not hooks-related

action: Verified full test suite (111 pass, 10 pre-existing failures), /log output format preserved, no old log.step patterns remain. No code changes needed.
Merged feat/hook-system into main. 8 commits, 13 files changed, 310 insertions, 39 deletions. Tests verified on main: 111 pass, 10 pre-existing failures.
Added chat_stream() to OpenAICompatProvider, AnthropicCompatProvider, and LLMClient. Fixed spec compliance (arguments->input key rename).
notes: CQR: 2 findings — false positive on missing await (SDK v2.2.0 returns AsyncStream directly), intentional no-retry in streaming per spec. Spec review: 1 iteration to fix arguments->input key rename.

action: Added run_stream() to OrchestratorEngine protocol and both implementations. Fixed spec compliance (tool_result id/ms fields).
notes: CQR: 3 findings — false positive on await, valid observability concern (deferred), max_iterations matches existing behavior. Spec review: 1 iteration to fix tool_result format.

action: Created StreamRenderer, Spinner, BRIX_THEME. Integrated streaming into CLI with _process_streaming(). Fixed spinner lifecycle (tool-only, double-finish) and safe-boundary relaxation.
notes: CQR: 2 rounds. Round 1: valid bugs (spinner lifecycle on tool-only, safe-boundary too strict). Round 2: spinner double-finish. All fixed with regression tests. 20 CLI tests pass.

task_title: Tool Display Panel with Hook Integration
action: Created ToolDisplay with formatted panels, Rich markup escaping, tool-specific formatting. Added is_error to tool_result events. Normalized non-dict tool args at construction time.
notes: CQR: 3 rounds. Round 1: markup injection, is_error missing, type guards. Round 2: non-streaming path coercion. Round 3: normalize at construction time. 45 tests pass.

action: All 4 tasks completed: streaming providers, streaming orchestrator, CLI integration, tool display. 156 tests pass.
notes: 15 commits in worktree. Streaming retry/fallback intentionally deferred. Observability hooks in streaming deferred.
